---
title: "Jack Mackerel SAM Results"
format:
  html:
    output-file: "index.html"
    self-contained: true
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
    anchor-sections: false
    number-sections: false
---

{{< include _includes/sprfmo-banner.html >}}

```{=html}
<div class="paper-title">Jack Mackerel SAM Results</div>
```

This page collects rendered SAM diagnostics now owned by the `JM_sam`
repository. The active report should be updated here; the retained
`JM_SCW_prep/sam` render is a frozen migration artifact from an earlier commit.

## Results

| Result | Source | Link |
|---|---|---|
| Active JM_sam diagnostics | `JM_sam` repository | [Open report](sam_diagnostics.html) |
| Frozen JM_SCW_prep SAM diagnostics | `JM_SCW_prep/sam`, commit `f5a21f0` | [Open retained report](scw_prep_f5a21f0/sam_diagnostics.html) |

## Notes

- `JM_sam` is the canonical repository for the SAM workflow and active report.
- The `JM_SCW_prep/sam` report is copied into `scw_prep_f5a21f0/` only to retain
  the earlier rendered result for provenance.
- New SAM changes should be made in `JM_sam`, not in `JM_SCW_prep/sam`.
